untranslatable_reason: Point-and-figure chart construction with dynamic box sizing and 3-box reversal identification requires specialized chart state tracking and pattern recognition not available in the allowed indicator set. This signal requires: (1) point-and-figure column tracking across multiple bars, (2) dynamic box size calculation based on minimum price movement, (3) reversal logic that depends on chart column transitions, and (4) support/resistance level identification from P&F patterns. None of these can be expressed using only OHLCV price data and standard technical indicators (MA, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots).
translation_notes: Signal KAUFMAN_DRY_16 requires proprietary point-and-figure charting logic that cannot be decomposed into standard indicator conditions. To implement this signal, either: (1) add a dedicated P&F indicator that returns support/resistance levels and reversal signals, or (2) use a custom pattern recognition module outside the standard indicator framework.
